creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
The sendbug program in 9.3 reports this error after running make delete-old, which removes the /etc/gnats/freefall file:

% sendbug
sendbug: could not read /etc/gnats/freefall for categories list.

Running send-pr gives a nice useful message about the deprecation of send-pr. I think sendbug should do the same, or just be removed entirely.
